characters.description: A Refined Defender who commands iron and void magic while pursuing safer ways to protect others. She owns the dimensional refuge Kit and begins openly dating Rain as both of them settle into a new Defender routine.
characters.name: Tala

characters.description: A newly Refined kinetic mage who joins Tala's Defender unit and needs practical combat experience at his new level. He and Tala agree to pursue their courtship openly.
characters.name: Rain

characters.description: Tala's flicker-teleporting avian companion and a formidable combat partner. He has grown unusually attached to her since the wolf fight.
characters.name: Terry

characters.description: A distinct mind-assistant sharing Tala's body. The collaborator comments on Tala's choices and relationships, offering an internal perspective while remaining separate enough to act as a genuine co-operator.
characters.name: Tala's inner collaborator

characters.description: Tala's sentient, soulbound dimensional storage, containing both her private refuge and a pocket town. Kit's separate mind allows those spaces to be divided into independently accessed partitions, changing Tala's travel and combat options.
characters.name: Kit

characters.description: A stone mage serving in Tala's Defender unit. When the containment fount creates false versions of the team, his copy immediately destroys itself because it lacks the soul and chosen commitment that keep Gert aligned with humanity.
characters.name: Gert

characters.description: A healer in training and experienced birth attendant who assists Kedva during the delivery of her son. She works beside the unit healer while Tala remains close as an emergency safeguard, providing practical care during Kit's first birth.
characters.name: Anna

characters.description: Brandon and Kedva's healthy newborn son and Irondale's first native-born resident. His parents choose magical rebirth for him after Tala finds no evidence that the process would cause harm.
characters.name: Brandon and Kedva's son

characters.description: An inscription specialist who verifies the schema for an infant's magical rebirth. She is also entrusted with planning Rain's revised inscriptions, making her a central technical adviser for the pair's development.
characters.name: Holly

characters.description: An adviser who resumes guiding Tala and Rain. He helps establish priorities for Rain's revised inscriptions and directs Tala to identify the shared purpose behind her many projects.
characters.name: Alefast's Paragon

characters.description: A Defender leader and experienced adviser who reviews Tala's weaknesses and research priorities with Tala and Rain. He recommends specialists, proposes new tests of Tala's authority over iron, and offers the pair advanced training.
characters.name: Grediv

characters.description: Tala's friend and a Caravaners Guild worker in the city where Tala relocates her pocket town. Her apprentice remains in her household while progressing toward becoming a mage.
characters.name: Lynn

characters.description: The proprietor of a closed shop reached through a difficult four-dimensional entrance that Tala can detect but cannot navigate alone.
characters.name: Lisa

characters.description: An archive administrator who controls access to Tala's archived memories and arranges compensation for approved viewers.
characters.name: Ingrit

characters.description: Tala's younger sister and an apprentice glassmaker. She challenges Tala for visiting mainly when a sibling must decide whether to attend the academy, and Tala recognizes the impression created by her limited visits.
characters.name: Nia

characters.description: A former healer whose body and magic regenerate despite the loss of her soul. Imprisoned for lethal experimentation on children, she escaped long ago by engineering a death that allowed her to reform elsewhere, leaving a book-linked trace behind.
characters.name: The escaped gateless Paragon

characters.description: An unidentified tri-gated mage who removes Tala's illusion and attacks with three separately activated sets of magic.
characters.name: The tri-gated mage

characters.description: A highly capable three-gated mage who fights Tala with layered air, dimensional, and healing magic. Bound to secrecy about her unusual condition, she escapes and reports Tala's discovery to city leadership rather than continue the clash.
characters.name: Cethira

characters.description: A sapient, reforged magical beast confined with the ancient forest to which he is bound. His growth once threatened the surrounding lands, but Tala sees a possible path to preserve his forest by moving the entire cell into Kit.
characters.name: The immortal elk

characters.description: A newly created parallel consciousness sharing Rain's body. He begins as a separate co-operator with little control over the volume of his communication, and he and Rain must establish a workable partnership.
characters.name: Rain's alternate interface

characters.description: A Constructionist and returning member of Tala's household. He works with Petra in Kit and contributes practical expertise to the refuge and the community growing within it, helping turn Tala's dimensional space into a functional home.
characters.name: Simon

characters.description: A returning member of Tala's household who lives and works with Simon inside Kit. She helps sustain the practical life of Tala's dimensional home and its resident community, contributing to the stable household behind Tala's wider projects.
characters.name: Petra

characters.description: A returning member of Tala's household, an artifact researcher, and Brandon's father. He brings specialized knowledge to the group living and working within Kit's pocket community.
characters.name: Adrill

characters.description: A returning member of Tala's household, a builder in Kit, and Kedva's partner. Their family is part of the small community taking shape within Tala's dimensional refuge, and his practical work helps make that protected settlement viable.
characters.name: Brandon

characters.description: Brandon's partner and a returning resident of Kit's pocket community. She contributes to the household's practical work and shares in the ordinary life taking shape within Tala's protected dimensional refuge.
characters.name: Kedva

characters.description: A regenerative, reality-manipulating prisoner who ambushes Tala's unit during a cell closure. He can revoke soul-body connections, evade magical attacks, and rebuild himself while demanding an account of the changed world and his people.
characters.name: The imprisoned arcane ruler
